name: Limitless (Mukagen)

requirements.note: Requires Six Eyes for full mastery and near-zero CE cost.

abilities.name: Infinity
abilities.description: Creates infinite distance between user and attacks.

mechanics.special_effect: Slows approaching objects to near-zero. Requires Six Eyes for constant activation.

abilities.name: Blue
abilities.description: Attraction force that pulls and crushes matter.

mechanics.special_effect: Generates negative space creating vacuum-like implosion.

abilities.name: Blue: Maximum Output
abilities.description: Amplified Blue for massive area effect.

mechanics.special_effect: Overcharged implosion. Can level buildings. High CE drain.

abilities.name: Red
abilities.description: Repulsion force that blasts away with positive energy.

mechanics.special_effect: Reverses CE to positive, generating explosive divergence.

abilities.name: Hollow Purple
abilities.description: Collision of Blue and Red. Imaginary mass erasure.

mechanics.special_effect: Merges convergence and divergence. Erases everything in path. Unblockable by most defenses.

domain_expansion.name: Unlimited Void
domain_expansion.description: Infinite void. Target bombarded with endless information — total paralysis.

barrier_techniques: Curtain: Barrier dome to conceal or restrict areas.
